mapper.sql: m.MENU_NO, m.MENU_PARENT_NO, m.MENU_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(m.MENU_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MENU_NAME, m.MENU_IMG, m.MENU_URL, m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO AS ORDER_NO, m.ACTIVITY

FROM SY_MENU m INNER JOIN SY_ROLE_RELATION rr ON m.MENU_NO = rr.MENU_NO INNER JOIN SY_ROLE r ON rr.ROLE_NO = r.ROLE_NO INNER JOIN SY_ROLE_GROUP_RELATION rgr ON rr.ROLE_NO = rgr.ROLE_NO INNER JOIN SY_USER_RELATION ur ON rgr.ROLE_GROUP_NO = ur.ROLE_GROUP_NO

WHERE ur.USER_NO = #{userNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND m.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND r.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rgr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ur.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.SELECTR = 1 AND NVL(TO_CHAR(r.SYS_TYPE), '0') = #{sysType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
WHERE ur.USER_NO = #{userNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND m.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND r.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rgr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ur.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.SELECTR = 1 AND NVL(TO_CHAR(r.SYS_TYPE), '0') = '1' ORDER BY m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO

SELECT DISTINCT
ORDER BY m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO

SELECT DISTINCT m.MENU_NO, m.MENU_PARENT_NO, m.MENU_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(m.MENU_NO, #{language, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MENU_NAME, m.MENU_IMG, m.MENU_URL, m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO AS ORDER_NO, m.ACTIVITY
WHERE ur.USER_NO = #{userNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND m.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND r.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rgr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ur.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.SELECTR = 1 AND NVL(TO_CHAR(r.SYS_TYPE), '0') = '1' ORDER BY m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO

SELECT DISTINCT
WHERE ur.USER_NO = #{userNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND m.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND r.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rgr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ur.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.SELECTR = 1 AND NVL(TO_CHAR(r.SYS_TYPE), '0') = '1' AND m.MENU_PARENT_NO = '2417' ORDER BY m.ORDERNO

SELECT DISTINCT
WHERE ur.USER_NO = #{userNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND m.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND r.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rgr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ur.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.SELECTR = 1 AND NVL(TO_CHAR(r.SYS_TYPE), '0') = '1' AND m.MENU_PARENT_NO = #{parentMenuNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY m.ORDERNO
